message:
test(cli): Add E2E integration tests for new, package, and policy commands

Comprehensive integration test coverage for CLI commands:

new_test.rs (~30KB):
- Test connector scaffolding with various templates
- Validate generated project structure
- Check Cargo.toml, manifest, and source file generation
- Test with different feature flags and options

package_metadata_test.rs (~4KB):
- Test package metadata extraction
- Validate SBOM generation
- Check manifest embedding in packages

policy_e2e_test.rs (~22KB):
- Test policy simulation end-to-end
- Validate DecisionReceipt output format
- Test various policy scenarios (allow, deny, require approval)
- Check error handling for invalid inputs

These tests invoke the real CLI binary to ensure command-line argument
parsing and output formatting work correctly in production scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
